testcase.failure:
[chromium] › e2e-automation.spec.ts:286:7 › MISRA Platform E2E Automation › Test Button - Quick Verification
Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed
Locator: locator('button:has-text("Login"), a:has-text("Sign In")') Expected: visible Timeout: 5000ms Error: element(s) not found
Call log: - Expect "toBeVisible" with timeout 5000ms - waiting for locator('button:has-text("Login"), a:has-text("Sign In")')
296 | // Check for main UI elements 297 | const loginButton = page.locator('button:has-text("Login"), a:has-text("Sign In")'); > 298 | await expect(loginButton).toBeVisible(); | ^ 299 | console.log('✅ Login button visible'); 300 | 301 | // Check for upload section at D:\Code\misra-testing\packages\backend\tests\e2e-automation.spec.ts:298:31
